tasks.subject: Task 1: Instrument deliver.angarium
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delivery#deliver! emits one deliver.angarium event per call with outcome + per-attempt fields, for all 7 outcomes.

**Files:** app/models/angarium/delivery.rb; test/models/angarium/delivery_instrumentation_test.rb (create)

**Verify:** bin/rails test test/models/angarium/delivery_instrumentation_test.rb

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/models/angarium/delivery.rb", "test/models/angarium/delivery_instrumentation_test.rb"], "verifyCommand": "bin/rails test test/models/angarium/delivery_instrumentation_test.rb", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deliver.angarium fires once per call", "outcome matches branch for all 7 outcomes", "code/http_duration only when HTTP; attempt absent for held/canceled", "no secret or response body in payload", "return values unchanged"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Instrument dispatch.angarium
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Angarium::Dispatch.call emits one dispatch.angarium event with event name, created event_id, and fan-out count (including 0 on no match).

**Files:** lib/angarium/dispatch.rb; test/lib/angarium/dispatch_instrumentation_test.rb (create)

**Verify:** bin/rails test test/lib/angarium/dispatch_instrumentation_test.rb

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/angarium/dispatch.rb", "test/lib/angarium/dispatch_instrumentation_test.rb"], "verifyCommand": "bin/rails test test/lib/angarium/dispatch_instrumentation_test.rb", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dispatch.angarium fires once per call", "deliveries equals fan-out size", "no-match yields deliveries=0 event_id=nil and returns nil"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Document instrumentation in README
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a ## Instrumentation section listing both events, their payloads, and a subscribe example.

**Files:** README.md (after ## Delivery guarantees)

**Verify:** grep for tells (none) and deliver.angarium (present)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n deliver.angarium README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["both events + payload keys documented", "runnable subscribe example present", "no em-dash/en-dash/ellipsis"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
